# 27Tools

> 27Tools is a growing collection of fast, simple browser-based utility tools.

## Site Overview

27Tools focuses on lightweight utilities that work directly in the browser where possible. The site currently highlights privacy-friendly workflows, small friction-free interfaces, and tasks that are useful for creators, photographers, and general web users.

Primary site URL:
- https://27tools.co/

Supporting pages:
- https://27tools.co/about/
- https://27tools.co/privacy/

Machine-readable endpoints:
- https://27tools.co/sitemap.xml
- https://27tools.co/schema.json
- https://27tools.co/robots.txt
- https://27tools.co/llms.txt

## Tools

### PNG to WEBP

URL:
- https://27tools.co/tools/png-to-webp/

Purpose:
- Convert PNG images into WEBP in the browser.

Key details:
- Batch conversion support.
- Adjustable WEBP quality.
- Local browser-side workflow rather than server uploads.
- Useful for transparent PNGs, screenshots, exported graphics, and website assets.

### Sony Shutter Count Tool

URL:
- https://27tools.co/tools/camera-shutter-count/

Purpose:
- Read Sony shutter count metadata from an original Sony JPG, JPEG, or ARW file.

Key details:
- Designed for original camera files.
- Intended for browser-side metadata reading.
- Useful when checking camera wear before buying or selling.

### Canon Shutter Count Tool

URL:
- https://27tools.co/tools/canon-shutter-count/

Purpose:
- Read Canon shutter count metadata from an original Canon CR3 file.

Key details:
- Designed for original Canon CR3 files.
- Keeps the metadata viewer available even when a reliable shutter count field is not exposed.
- Intended for browser-side metadata reading.
- Useful when checking camera wear before buying or selling.

### HEX to RGB and Pantone

URL:
- https://27tools.co/tools/hex-to-rgb-to-pantone/

Purpose:
- Convert HEX colours into RGB values and compare closest Pantone-style matches.

Key details:
- Live HEX validation.
- RGB output with preview.
- Closest-match comparison cards for Pantone-style results.

## Publishing Notes

- Canonical domain: https://27tools.co
- Public pages are linked through the homepage, menu, and sitemap.
- Structured data is also available inline on key pages and aggregated in `schema.json`.
